rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into component type or implementation scopes based on visibility of ports and bindings.
Preserve AADL architecture by not introducing references to subcomponents or implementation-only entities in component type contracts.
generic_rules: Contract scope must match the visibility of features: type scope for ports, implementation scope for subcomponent bindings.
Only use AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions; avoid implicit property references.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` for all AGREE content.
Component type annexes: assume/guarantee over visible ports. Implementation annexes: use assign for subcomponent bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent paths or internal ports in component type annexes.
